subject: A sweeping vista of Ravnica's wilds — a green-overgrown plaza or terraced ruin lined with broad-leafed trees and stone walls, the city's silhouette and a curved aqueduct or bridge running through the middle distance under a warm sunset sky
description: An urban-wild landscape rendered in warm sunset hues. The foreground holds tall, fan-like leaves and dark silhouetted foliage framing the view. The middle ground shows a tiered stone structure — possibly a plaza, garden terrace, or aqueduct — overrun with greenery and trees, with paths or canals threading through it. In the distance, faint city architecture and spires rise against an orange-pink sky streaked with clouds. The light is golden and low, casting long shadows and giving the whole scene a sublime, hushed quality. No figures are visible.
foreground: tall fan-leaved plants and dark silhouetted foliage framing the view
background: ruined or overgrown urban terraces with distant city silhouette under a sunset sky
